	/* nova_ext_anti_spam_questions:contact v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function contact()
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\\AntiSpam')
			&& \nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\AntiSpam::shouldBlock()) {
			$this->_regions['flash_message'] = Location::view(
				'flash', $this->skin, 'main',
				\nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\AntiSpam::flashError()
			);
			unset($_POST['submit']);
		}

		parent::contact();
	}
	/* nova_ext_anti_spam_questions:contact END */

	/* nova_ext_anti_spam_questions:join v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function join()
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\\AntiSpam')
			&& \nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\AntiSpam::shouldBlock()) {
			$this->_regions['flash_message'] = Location::view(
				'flash', $this->skin, 'main',
				\nova_ext_anti_spam_questions\AntiSpam::flashError()
			);
			unset($_POST['submit']);
			$_POST['agree'] = 'agree';
		}

		parent::join();
	}
	/* nova_ext_anti_spam_questions:join END */
